title: German Beef Stir Fry
description: A hearty German-inspired beef stir fry with a crunchy twist, low in carbs and packed with flavor.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the shredded cabbage and cook until slightly tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the German seasoning blend and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine with the cabbage and seasoning.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the beef is coated in the seasoning.
